name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ I'm your team's async standup bot — no meetings, no interruptions.

Here's how it works:
• Each workday, I send you a standup prompt in private
• You reply with what you did, plan to do, and any blockers
• I compile answers into a digest posted to your team channel

**Setting up your channel:**
• Go to Manage Team → Share team channel
• Forward any message from your channel to me
• I'll grab the channel info — no need to look up IDs

Use the buttons to start a standup, view history, or manage your team.
Everything is reachable by tapping — no commands to remember.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
